name: cookbook-audit
tagline: Audits an Anthropic Cookbook notebook against a style guide/rubric, runs a secrets scan, and produces a structured X/20 scored report.
verdict: Well-specified: concrete report template, worked good/bad examples throughout, and a defensive secret-scanning step. Gaps: no scope exclusions, no handling if validate_notebook.py or the notebook path fails, and the detect-secrets dependency isn't declared upfront.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' text anywhere; could misfire on non-Cookbook notebook reviews with no stated boundary.
No guidance for what to do if validate_notebook.py fails, the notebook path is invalid, or style_guide.md is missing.
272-line SKILL.md re-embeds large chunks of style_guide.md content (full anti-pattern catalog, structural templates) despite pointing readers to that file.
